name: Time Projector
recharge_time: At least 4 hours for recharging and calibration. New destination or switching send/pick-up adds another half hour.
malfunction_text: Operator must roll under Time Machine skill. Malfunction never sends wrong destination; fries circuits requiring 4D6 hours of repairs.
details: Anchored in time and space. One-way only: sends out or retrieves from a target time and place.

name: Temporal Gate
recharge_time: 1 hour between portal openings. New destination calibration takes 15 minutes.
malfunction_text: Operator must roll under Time Machine skill. Malfunction never sends wrong destination; requires complete reset taking 2D6 hours.
details: Two-way portal into another time. Portal remains open for 3D6 rounds.

name: Portable Time Machine
recharge_time: 20 minutes on high-voltage or running motor. Hand-cranked emergency generator takes 2D4 hours.
malfunction_text: Operator must roll under Time Machine skill. Malfunction means rolling on the Temporal Mishap table.
details: Vehicle-suitable machine that travels across time and can access neighboring Twists.

name: Cross-Dimensional Gateway Generator
recharge_time: About 1 hour to recharge and calibrate for another dimensional locus.
max_area_of_effect: Up to 20 yards/meters wide and 12 yards/meters high
malfunction_text: Operator must roll under Dimension Device skill. Failed roll percentile determines shutdown, wrong place, or massive cross-dimensional mislocation.
details: Immobile mechanism that opens a portal to another dimension for as long as it is powered.

name: Portable Cross-Dimensional Device
recharge_time: About 1 hour to recharge and recalibrate.
malfunction_text: Operator must roll under Dimension Device skill. Failed roll percentile determines self-only transport, shutdown, wrong place, or massive cross-dimensional mislocation.
details: Moving dimensional travel device. Teleports itself and cargo to a cross-dimensional location.

name: Miniature Cross-Dimensional Device (Hopper)
malfunction_text: Operator must roll under Dimension Device skill. Failed roll percentile determines housing separation, shutdown, wrong place, or massive cross-dimensional mislocation.
details: Smaller improved portable C-D device. Can be mounted in a vehicle, carried like a suitcase, or built into other equipment.
